meta.intent: recreate a clean B2B SaaS ad graphic with a bold social-proof headline and a grid of client logos
meta.design_language: Meta-friendly ad creative, startup software landing-page aesthetic, premium but simple
meta.use_case: paid social ad, Instagram feed creative, B2B software brand awareness

scene.environment: no real-world setting, fully graphic layout
scene.visual_goal: instantly communicate social proof and product legitimacy through strong number-first headline and recognizable customer logo wall

canvas.finish: clean digital gradient, no harsh edges, no visible banding

composition.layout: top-heavy headline with lower-half logo grid
composition.cta_zone: none visible in this cropped version
composition.visual_flow: headline first, number second, supporting copy third, brand logos last

typography.font_family: clean rounded geometric sans-serif similar to Inter, SF Pro Display, or Circular
typography.line_height: compact but airy enough for premium feel

structure.layout_feel: slightly irregular but balanced pill-button grid

pill_containers.height: uniform within each row, with small variation for authenticity

logos_style.color_treatment: mostly white logos, with select pills having filled brand colors
logos_style.render_style: vector logo treatment, clean and crisp
logos_style.scale: fit comfortably inside pills with even padding

layout_notes.top_row: partially cropped pills visible at far left and right edges, matching the screenshot feel
layout_notes.middle_rows: logos alternate between white-outline pills and a few filled-color pills for visual variety
layout_notes.bottom_row: three or four prominent pills visible with strong spacing and centered alignment

design_characteristics.conversion_approach: trust-building via large adoption number plus recognizable logo cluster
design_characteristics.visual_density: moderate, with breathing room above the logo wall
design_characteristics.ad_feel: looks like a static paid social creative from an ad automation platform

lighting_and_rendering.lighting_type: flat design lighting with ambient digital glow
lighting_and_rendering.render_quality: crisp edges, polished typography, no 3D depth unless extremely subtle

generation_notes.priority_1: preserve the exact visual hierarchy of a small top line, huge central number, then four centered supporting lines
generation_notes.priority_2: keep the blue-violet gradient background smooth and premium
generation_notes.priority_3: make the logo pills feel authentic, evenly spaced, and high-end
generation_notes.priority_4: ensure the piece reads as a SaaS social-proof ad, not a generic poster
generation_notes.priority_5: maintain a feed-friendly cropped composition with no surrounding app interface
